data.title: MEXC Launches Eighth Anniversary Futures Team Trading Competition With 10 Million USDT Prize Pool
data.description: In Victoria, Seychelles, on April 8, 2026, MEXC, a global leader in zero-fee digital asset trading, has initiated its eighth-anniversary futures team trading contest. This initiative marks the celebration of eight years of progress by offering rewards to users globally. The competition features a tiered prize pool reaching up to 10 million.

data.title: Flashfood and Kroger Expand Partnership Across Kroger’s Entire Mid-Atlantic Division
data.description: In Richmond, Virginia, Flashfood, a surplus grocery platform utilized by major grocery retailers in North America, has expanded to all 100+ Kroger stores in the Mid-Atlantic Division. With the aim of tackling surplus food waste within Kroger establishments, Flashfood is enhancing accessibility to fresh and affordable groceries for customers in the southeast region. Following its introduction in 16 Kroger stores in the Richmond area last summer, Flashfood has enabled shoppers at Kroger to collectively save close to $700,000 on fresh groceries.

data.title: Mesocare.org Announces Launch of WikiMesothelioma.com to Expand Public Access to Mesothelioma Information
data.description: Houston-based organization Mesocare.org, which assists those impacted by mesothelioma, has funded the creation of WikiMesothelioma.com. This educational site aims to offer easily understandable information on the disease. The launch took place on April 8, 2026.

data.title: Travel Smarter and Safer for the FIFA World Cup 2026 with the New Informer from Safeture and Riskline
data.description: In Lund, Sweden on April 8, 2026, it was announced that the FIFA World Cup 2026, set to be the largest tournament ever held, will feature 16 host cities and attract millions of visitors. Scheduled to take place from June 11 to July 19, 2026, the event will be hosted jointly by the United States, Canada, and Mexico.

data.title: Portrai to Present 11 Posters on AI-Driven Spatial Transcriptomics at AACR 2026
data.description: A spatial biology company based in South Korea has introduced advanced AI agents, foundation models, and spatial biomarkers aimed at revolutionizing oncology drug discovery. Portrai, Inc., located in SEOUL, South Korea, made the announcement on April 8, 2026. The company revealed that they will be showcasing 11 posters showcasing the capabilities of their artificial intelligence technologies and innovations.

data.title: WIF aiming for $0.24 by month-end, currently at $0.20 with RSI at 59.14. Possible rally to $0.24-$0.28 if resistance is breached.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Dogwifhat (WIF) is currently experiencing bullish momentum, trading at $0.20 with a Relative Strength Index (RSI) of 59.14. Technical analysis indicates a possible rally towards the $0.24-$0.28 range if important resistance levels are surpassed.
